mapper.select: SELECT m.member_number, m.member_id, m.member_nickname, s.grad_school, s.grad_depart, m.survey_number, f.file_name AS memberProfile, TO_CHAR(mt.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt FROM UB_MEMBER m JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR s ON m.survey_number = s.survey_number LEFT JOIN UB_FILE f ON m.member_profile = f.file_number LEFT JOIN UB_MENTORING mt ON m.member_number = mt.mentor_number WHERE m.member_type = 'MENTOR' AND m.member_state = '계정 활성화' ORDER BY m.member_number DESC

SELECT m.member_number, m.member_nickname, s.grad_school, s.grad_depart, m.member_profile AS memberProfile, mt.mentoring_title AS mentoringTitle, mt.mentoring_goal AS mentoringGoal, mt.mentoring_detail AS mentoringDetail, TO_CHAR(mt.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt FROM UB_MEMBER m JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR s ON m.survey_number = s.survey_number LEFT JOIN UB_MENTORING mt ON m.member_number = mt.mentor_number WHERE m.member_number = #{memberNumber}
